series_metadata.series_title: Requests for Authorization to Issue Obligations
series_metadata.series_description: Requests from school districts for consent to issue obligations not covered in other retention schedules. These include but are not limited to tax anticipation notes in accordance with ORC 5705.216 and bonds under federal programs such as the Qualified Zone Academy Bond Program (QZAB) and Qualified School Construction Bonds (QSCB). Files may include approval or disapproval documentation, applications requesting consent, request letters or email correspondence, required resolutions and certifications.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: records life of obligation if approved. If unapproved, five (5) years. ; Paper: records life of obligation if approved. If unapproved, five (5) years
